vol_name: Spatial Uncertainty and Information Processing Speed in Infants and Adults: Age Differences in Saccadic Reaction Time Sensitivity
vol_description: This dataset contains the participant mean data from adults, and 5-month-old and 9-month-old infants.  All participants completed a speed of information task in which a single stimulus was presented in one of either 1, 2, 4, 6, or 8 possible locations as indicated by box frames around those locations.  Adults' reaction time to indicate the location was measured with both a manual response and a saccade response.  Infants' reaction time was measured with a saccade response.
